tasks.label: USD: Build toolchain
tasks.detail: Builds TBB, OpenSubdiv, and monolithic-static OpenUSD into build-usd/install. Run once, then only re-run if deps or flags change.

tasks.label: Extension: Build
tasks.detail: Configures + compiles godot-usd (CMake + MSVC on Windows). Incremental — re-run after code changes. Default build task (Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+B).

tasks.label: Extension: Install to test_project
tasks.detail: Copies the compiled binary and addon files into test_project/addons/godot-usd/ so you can open test_project in Godot to try the plugin.

args: $dest = 'test_project/addons/godot-usd'; $bin = Join-Path $dest 'bin'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force $bin | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Force 'addons/godot-usd/plugin.cfg','addons/godot-usd/plugin.gd','addons/godot-usd/godot-usd.gdextension' $dest; $dll = Get-ChildItem -Path bin,build -Recurse -Filter godot-usd.dll -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $dll) { throw 'godot-usd.dll not found. Run `Extension: Build` first.' }; Copy-Item -Force $dll.FullName $bin; if (Test-Path 'build-usd/install/lib/usd') { Copy-Item -Recurse -Force 'build-usd/install/lib/usd' $bin }; Write-Host "Installed to $dest"

set -e; dest=test_project/addons/godot-usd; mkdir -p "$dest/bin"; cp addons/godot-usd/plugin.cfg addons/godot-usd/plugin.gd addons/godot-usd/godot-usd.gdextension "$dest/"; bin=$(find bin lib build -name 'libgodot-usd.so' -o -name 'libgodot-usd.dylib' -o -name 'godot-usd.dll' 2>/dev/null | head -n1); [ -n "$bin" ] || { echo 'built binary not found; run Extension: Build first' >&2; exit 1; }; cp "$bin" "$dest/bin/"; [ -d build-usd/install/lib/usd ] && cp -R build-usd/install/lib/usd "$dest/bin/" || true; echo "Installed to $dest"

set -e; dest=test_project/addons/godot-usd; mkdir -p "$dest/bin"; cp addons/godot-usd/plugin.cfg addons/godot-usd/plugin.gd addons/godot-usd/godot-usd.gdextension "$dest/"; bin=$(find bin lib build -name 'libgodot-usd.dylib' -o -name 'libgodot-usd.so' 2>/dev/null | head -n1); [ -n "$bin" ] || { echo 'built binary not found; run Extension: Build first' >&2; exit 1; }; cp "$bin" "$dest/bin/"; [ -d build-usd/install/lib/usd ] && cp -R build-usd/install/lib/usd "$dest/bin/" || true; echo "Installed to $dest"

tasks.label: Extension: Build & install to test_project
tasks.detail: Runs `Extension: Build` followed by `Extension: Install to test_project`.

tasks.label: Extension: Clean
tasks.detail: Removes build/ and bin/ (the godot-usd extension's CMake build tree). Leaves build-usd/ alone — USD is expensive to rebuild.

args: Remove-Item -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue build,bin; Write-Host 'Cleaned build/ and bin/'
rm -rf build bin && echo 'Cleaned build/ and bin/'
rm -rf build bin && echo 'Cleaned build/ and bin/'

tasks.label: Godot: Open test_project (editor)
tasks.detail: Launches the Godot editor against test_project/. Requires `godot` on PATH or set env.GODOT in settings.json.

tasks.label: Godot: Run test_project
tasks.detail: Runs test_project/ in Godot without the editor (play mode).
